2604.12627.title: KnowRL: Boosting LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Minimal-Sufficient Knowledge Guidance
2604.12627.paper_summary: RLVR improves reasoning in large language models, but its effectiveness is often limited by severe reward sparsity on hard problems. Recent hint-based RL methods mitigate sparsity by injecting partial solutions or abstract templates, yet they typically scale guidance by adding more tokens, which introduce redundancy, inconsistency, and extra training overhead. We propose \textbf{KnowRL} (Knowledge-Guided Reinforcement Learning), an RL training framework that treats hint design as a minimal-sufficient guidance problem. During RL training, KnowRL decomposes guidance into atomic knowledge points (KPs) and uses Constrained Subset Search (CSS) to construct compact, interaction-aware subsets for training. We further identify a pruning interaction paradox -- removing one KP may help while removing multiple such KPs can hurt -- and explicitly optimize for robust subset curation under this dependency structure. We train KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B from OpenMath-Nemotron-1.5B. Across eight reasoning benchmarks at the 1.5B scale, KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B consistently outperforms strong RL and hinting baselines. Without KP hints at inference, KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B reaches 70.08 average accuracy, already surpassing Nemotron-1.5B by +9.63 points; with selected KPs, performance improves to 74.16, establishing a new state of the art at this scale. The model, curated training data, and code are publicly available at https://github.com/Hasuer/KnowRL.
2604.12627.paper_summary_zh: RLVR 改善了大型語言模型的推理能力，但其效能常常受到困難問題上獎勵稀疏的嚴重限制。最近的基於提示的強化學習方法通過注入部分解決方案或抽象模板來緩解稀疏性，然而它們通常通過添加更多的標記來擴展指導，這會引入冗餘、不一致性和額外的訓練開銷。我們提出了 \textbf{KnowRL}（知識引導強化學習），這是一個將提示設計視為最小充分引導問題的強化學習訓練框架。在強化學習訓練期間，KnowRL 將指導分解為原子知識點（KPs），並使用約束子集搜索（CSS）來構建緊湊的、考慮互動的子集進行訓練。我們進一步識別了一個修剪互動悖論——移除一個 KP 可能有助於改善，而移除多個此類 KP 可能會造成損害——並在這一依賴結構下明確優化穩健的子集策劃。我們從 OpenMath-Nemotron-1.5B 訓練 KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B。在 1.5B 規模的八個推理基準上，KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B 一直超越強大的強化學習和提示基準。在推理時沒有 KP 提示的情況下，KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B 達到了 70.08 的平均準確率，已經超過了 Nemotron-1.5B +9.63 分；使用選定的 KPs，性能提高到 74.16，創造了這一規模下的新技術水平。該模型、策劃的訓練數據和代碼已公開於 https://github.com/Hasuer/KnowRL。
2604.12627.author: Linhao Yu et.al.
2604.12627.authors: Linhao Yu, Tianmeng Yang, Siyu Ding, Renren Jin, Naibin Gu, Xiangzhao Hao, Shuaiyi Nie, Deyi Xiong, Weichong Yin, Yu Sun, Hua Wu
